course_title: Cell & Tissue Biology for Agriculture & Veterinary Science

learning_outcomes.description: Distinguish the main tissue types (epithelia, connective tissues, bone, cartilage, muscle, nervous tissue and blood) and integumentary structures within histological sections of complex tissues and organs.
Describe the physiology of muscle and nervous tissue and how this relates to the structure of muscle and nervous tissue, respectively.
Explain the importance of homeostasis and how this is achieved through cell membrane function and cellular communication.

assessments.due_date:
Epithelium 12/08/2026 - 14/08/2026

Connective Tissue 19/08/2026 - 21/08/2026

Muscle 2/09/2026 - 4/09/2026

Nervous Tissue 16/09/2026 - 18/09/2026

Cartilage & Bone 23/09/2026 - 25/09/2026

Blood 14/10/2026 - 16/10/2026

Glands & Secretion 21/10/2026 - 23/10/2026

Integument 28/10/2026 - 30/10/2026

Please monitor AGRC1041 Blackboard for updates.
assessments.task_description:
Eight (8) quizzes relate to each of the practical classes. Each quiz consists of 5 multiple-choice questions. Further details will be provided on the AGRC1041 Blackboard site. Students will be given ample notice if quiz dates have to be changed.

Quiz answers must be the work of individual students; collusion will be considered misconduct.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.

assessments.assessment_title: End of Semester: Digital Practical Exam
assessments.task_description:
End of Semester: Digital Practical Exam will cover all of the material in the histology practical classes. Further details will be provided on the AGRC1041 Blackboard site and in the Course Wrap-up lecture in Week 13.

Exam questions may include: multiple response, text entry, matching/pairing, inline choice, drag and drop, composite, hotspot and matching, and case‑based applied‑reasoning items.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.

assessments.task_description: End of Semester: Theory Exam will cover all lectures from Week 1 through to Week 13. Further details will be provided on the AGRC1041 Blackboard site and in the Course Wrap-up lecture in Week 13.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.
